OPENING CREDITS ROLL and end in BLACKNESS Slowly, a sound fades in. Low and indistinct at first, until it becomes the buzzing of an insect. As the sound grows louder, a vague image takes shape in the distance: a FLY appears weaving its way to the foreground. As it gets closer, it moves out of frame, only to re-enter, CLOSER and LOUDER each time. Other less distinct sounds become audible as the fly approaches. These sounds become recognizable as MUFFLED VOICES and BREATHING, still unclear, due to the LOUD BUZZING of the fly, now quite large in the frame. The buzzing is blaringly loud as the FLY abruptly exits again, leaving the frame BLACK and SILENT. A moment later, the huge, monstrous face of the fly SMASHES into frame filling it entirely.
